required_basis_fields: p/p_rgh basis; endpoint pair; elevation; velocity/area; hydraulic diameter; recovery plane; sign convention
required_release_fields: property mode; pressure endpoint fields; ordinary-flow topology; straight/development reference; same-QOI UQ
minimum_acceptance: Every fitted row has same-basis endpoints and positive physical loss after declared corrections.
still_forbidden: CFD mdot runtime input; clipped K; recirculating-row ordinary K.

required_basis_fields: p_rgh/static mapping; hydrostatic/kinetic subtraction; section endpoint names; residual sign
required_release_fields: predeclared section model; property/velocity basis; uncertainty
minimum_acceptance: Residual is labeled section-effective and not component-isolated.
still_forbidden: Component K/F6 admission from section residual.

required_basis_fields: Q sign convention; wall layer geometry; source/sink lane; external BC map
required_release_fields: source/property/cp release; wall/material setup fields; same-QOI UQ
minimum_acceptance: Wall conduction/external convection/radiation/storage/residual lanes are separate.
still_forbidden: Realized wallHeatFlux as runtime input; residual into internal Nu.

required_basis_fields: bulk state; sensor location; Gz/reset; source sign; property basis
required_release_fields: cp/mu/k release; source envelope; same-QOI projection UQ
minimum_acceptance: Projection is frozen before validation/holdout/external scoring.
still_forbidden: D2 empirical offset as final predictive correction.

required_basis_fields: pressure basis; exchange flux basis; Qwall/source path; mesh label
required_release_fields: same-label mesh/GCI or accepted UQ; source/property/Qwall release
minimum_acceptance: Exchange cell uses same-window basis and reports uncertainty.
still_forbidden: Ordinary upcomer Nu/f_D/K on recirculating rows.
